mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM place p
p.deleted_at IS NULL
AND p.category = #{category}
AND ( p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.road_address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

SELECT p.place_id, p.city_id, c.name AS city_name, p.name, p.category, p.address, p.road_address, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.phone, p.description, p.image_url, p.opening_time, p.closing_time, COALESCE(fav_agg.like_count, 0) AS like_count, COALESCE(review_agg.review_count, 0) AS review_count, tag_agg.tags_csv FROM place p JOIN city c ON p.city_id = c.city_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT place_id, COUNT(*) AS like_count FROM place_favorite GROUP BY place_id ) fav_agg ON p.place_id = fav_agg.place_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT place_id, COUNT(*) AS review_count FROM review WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY place_id ) review_agg ON p.place_id = review_agg.place_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pt.place_id, GROUP_CONCAT(t.name ORDER BY t.name SEPARATOR ',') AS tags_csv FROM place_tag pt JOIN tag t ON pt.tag_id = t.tag_id WHERE pt.can_use = 1 AND t.can_use = 1 GROUP BY pt.place_id ) tag_agg ON p.place_id = tag_agg.place_id WHERE p.place_id = #{placeId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM place WHERE place_id = #{placeId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT p.place_id, p.name, p.category, p.image_url, p.description AS summary, COALESCE(fav_agg.like_count, 0) AS like_count, tag_agg.tags_csv FROM place_favorite pf JOIN place p ON pf.place_id = p.place_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT place_id, COUNT(*) AS like_count FROM place_favorite GROUP BY place_id ) fav_agg ON p.place_id = fav_agg.place_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pt.place_id, GROUP_CONCAT(t.name ORDER BY t.name SEPARATOR ',') AS tags_csv FROM place_tag pt JOIN tag t ON pt.tag_id = t.tag_id WHERE pt.can_use = 1 AND t.can_use = 1 GROUP BY pt.place_id ) tag_agg ON p.place_id = tag_agg.place_id WHERE pf.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY pf.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM place_favorite pf JOIN place p ON pf.place_id = p.place_id WHERE pf.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
